name: use-modpacks
description: Orchestration index for installing, exporting and updating modpacks. Use when the user mentions modpacks ("整合包","装整合","modpack","mrpack").
body:
# Modpacks

Goal: a working modpack instance with zero manual steps, and correct handling across
install/export/update.

- **Install** a pack (search, confirm version, create its own instance): see
  `modpacks-install`.
- **Export** the user's current setup as a shareable `.mrpack`: see `modpacks-export`.
- **Update a pack**: a pack updates as a WHOLE. Install the new pack version as a FRESH
  instance via `modpacks-install` — do not hand-update mods one-by-one inside an
  existing pack instance, that breaks pack version coherence. Migrate the user's saves
  (`worlds-backup`) and options into the new instance, keep the old instance until
  the new one is confirmed working, then offer to delete the old one.

Don't install a pack into an existing instance. Don't guess pack names/versions — search first.
